title: Global Spectrum Energy Services To Consider Interim Dividend - FinancialEDGE
description: The board of directors of Global Spectrum Energy Services Plc, on Friday Sepetmebr 13, 2019, in a notification to the market said it’s had agreed that a final decision on the proposals for an interim dividend. This according a statement signed by the company secretary Ayoshile Kuforiji-Kehinde, will be made alongside the time of release
html:
The board of directors of Global Spectrum Energy Services Plc, on Friday Sepetmebr 13, 2019, in a notification to the market said it’s had agreed that a final decision on the proposals for an interim dividend.

This according a statement signed by the company secretary Ayoshile Kuforiji-Kehinde, will be made alongside the time of release of third quarter financial report.
